query:
SELECT 
            lp.id,
            lp.difficulty::text as "difficulty!",
            lp.path_structure
        FROM learning_paths lp
        WHERE lp.status = 'published'
        AND NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM learning_path_progress lpp
            WHERE lpp.learning_path_id = lp.id
            AND lpp.user_id = $1
        )
        LIMIT 50
